textByHash.035b027932694ac615b5daefdea0092093d77bc7: So, I hear you were the one to foil Glough's plans. Thank you, human, he had been setting our kingdoms against one another for far too long.
textByHash.04dc2dddfaa51b3fce156018dc529d96ad9887ec: In particular you may have heard of such activities in a city known to the humans as Ardougne.
textByHash.088908c277a04aacde67f11a15588716cd46265b: Finally, there can be peace between Ape Atoll and the mainland. , you are welcome to visit Ape Atoll whenever you please, we will be opening our gates to the outside world for the first time.
textByHash.0d23ed31690925a6ad01299a74aae2d8b83db2f9: You have shown yourself to be very resourceful. You have managed to complete an extremely long journey remarkably quickly.
textByHash.106f28a0f9214fa16e7cb20ff7fb633e15bdd2e2: However, I am well aware that you may have a few things to offer.
textByHash.18d9b1917c1a71dbaec54488c203b3d2899c9a26: Ah finally, Kruk! I was beginning to think you had run into trouble...
textByHash.1b1f898c67ac73222b2459c3ab3675ad0e9f06bd: Now that we know their story, you can rest assured that their memory will live on here.
textByHash.1c9a2ea7af3941d8e577794a4c3a3913c34a37b4: What would you have me do?
textByHash.22f5749011aac2c171f00c792886dade99079de4: This is a disaster! What about your secret weapon?
textByHash.23f511f3e8d43adc2913c073f9b5e0501292fb63: Uwogo, have a messenger fetch him from his post.
textByHash.283c401e2f4f2b8a8817b7d5ac0f13ba91cc9674: What do you want? I'm very busy right now.
textByHash.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
textByHash.2d27127a382df9a274289420d5353865c38ccefa: I need you to answer this for me.
textByHash.35686d8a1d9c7ba78a16d71b4cb42e12cd6e064c: I've instructed my people to allow you full access to our Island, but beware I do not command the undead beneath us.
textByHash.38a64898d5482c6c3642b3c5ab57e4580d390128: Have you brought with you a captive?
textByHash.434b48f26d4bd963ccb3a5ab33c49c6a6488b830: What was that? Is there a problem?
textByHash.4a82fe208c17622e8f6698cd78d1ae9df06d581c: With access to one of Glough's 'pets', I don't think I'll need it...
textByHash.61d5e8a9f37b008e5a29cee14b8fdb3f8d6d6907: It is always dark here, Gnome. Why have you asked to see me in private?
textByHash.66476d4dfa2700b489bf8b08e41bd5e125ab4a36: I don't have time for idle chat! What do you want?
textByHash.67687c7f049c87c72127f82f66f5c74ef3114aad: I must be heading back now. Farewell, King Narnode, and thank you again.
textByHash.6ca2a90c222e4f42e85fd3e4accecbd260589a0a: Excellent. I must prepare for my meeting, Uwogo.
textByHash.84a43619cff0c4ddc35c01ceef01dd66b7bd7dd6: Why would I want to do that? Your king would declare war on my island.
textByHash.84c120f626041d917694ae2721997dd69b9c95e2: You must be well aware your kind are hunted and trapped almost everywhere.
textByHash.89f9f630ada08bcbbe9945835a275a40abf812a2: Intriguing. I have recently secured an alliance with the northern monkeys, which may prove useful.
textByHash.8e2fc7b6e14f69b846bf6433fe77d3464ecd576c: So, how is progress of our plans coming along?
textByHash.8f904328978acf87aaf53ea5f48d99dddaa6dc5e: I should hope so, for both of your sakes.
textByHash.919b1061067e579b6dcb5feb656e18017641a15d: Hmmm, perhaps you could make yourself useful after all, visitor. Why don't you run along to the gate and remind Kruk of our meeting.
textByHash.93355a9e54055507d8ce8b61860f1e259249dc0b: I must think upon it some more and discuss the matter with my advisers. We will contact you when we are ready.
textByHash.9cab209b698c0678db9fd581440b3bd6a61fe817: You have failed me for the last time, Kruk, you are hereby stripped of your rank and duties. Uwogo, cancel all of my upcoming meetings, I need some time alone.
textByHash.9fc8a8a39e36e747120d0b403b88769403b3f96d: You are clearly well acquainted with the ways of this world. We will talk more on this later.
textByHash.a0429d46302910f7a5e0c4675393d47b748d77b6: Agh! You have left me no choice but to cancel our assault on the mainland...
textByHash.b55091b91316600097b77a1c5c6a76ae06440e0d: I have heard your kind are exceptionally resourceful. I wish to put this reputation to the test.
textByHash.bae632525d8cb9f0859ddbc43cb9037bb203fb75: Please, feel free to talk to the new head of the Ape Atoll guard, Duke, about advanced combat training, should you wish to receive it.
textByHash.bbe2be63236cfe3d934899ff69dbef8be25062ff: Then hurry, visitor. I am beginning to lose my faith in you.
textByHash.bff4cc387a3e18eecb57a39bcacfca7386f777f5: In the meantime, feel free to remain as long as you like on my island.
textByHash.c50c73d93774b26efd0b88f09762ca781f88c9d1: You have brought peace between our kingdoms.
textByHash.c96e8848a3c8ff9f5401a8867de9d098bee575bb: We decided to move forward with our three-way assault.
textByHash.ca4306ab6d75e1f660bdde19410fe26f8380e5f6: You were negotiating an alliance with the ogres and trolls, working on a new fleet of battleships and then developing that secret weapon of yours.
textByHash.cf1185281259df19cc3ed880853e40836c109f2a: Excellent. Have you had any further considerations for our plans?
textByHash.cfdd95749e4449d8fc66285306826be70f8c5ff2: Don't let me down Kruk, we all know what is at stake here.
textByHash.d1ab01537f52560498302695b8401c1556cdb3cc: I only discuss such matters with my highest ranking military officials. In fact, I am supposed to be in a meeting with my commander right now. Kruk has been consistently late to our meetings recently.
textByHash.d4b12bb58e5de9d4949e143ad973d433223a738d: How can that be? Go check again!
textByHash.da61e34a02ecb43438d13e19770e9de2c33192f9: I don't know what you're talking about. We haven't been involved with Glough since he failed us.
textByHash.e58c54416eded6b2c0f877ea1d5d718e4d105232: Very well. I shall let you know when I have dealt with the Royal Guard.
textByHash.e94ae56e0079bbf20f7923008c050e3988a8a1de: Well, that was a fascinating story. We have of course heard of various troops of our kind spread across the land, but this is the first I have heard of these ones.
textByHash.ed8c689cecdb3b005dbc429b55d34a9b41285ae8: This is for you to decide, visitor.
textByHash.ef84d6ce05cdd5ce61ec6569afc6f953e2470e9f: There are several of your kind kept captive there. I challenge you to free one and return it to me.
textByHash.f722f059f3f5ec645d7cfac1a750470e98f276ca: Now that's quite the banana. Where did you get it?
textByHash.f8cf80449215eea37a2186926032e06cc40eb073: I must admit, I have always regarded your kind as our inferior cousins, visitor.
textByHash.fa4ea03f0d8a1b9f0abf5541a211a8e353ac91b6: I see. Ours is a strong and mighty lineage of monkey, visitor. We clearly do not need your offer of an alliance.
textByHash.fba19265259dccb798c4e01643aeb295ee1d490d: Greetings, visitor. What brings you to my island?
textByHash.fc45f553c833b11f972035365951e38aa9d27a9f: Are you sure everything is okay Kruk? You seem very distracted lately.
